privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the synthetic GNU Health demo database (gnuhealth-50-demo.sql.gz). The target patient, Ana Isabel Betz (PUID: GNU777ORG), exists in the database with an occupation of "Teacher", explicitly contradicting the prompt"s "Obstetrician" metadata claim; furthermore, the GNU Health schema lacks an "industry" field. The target Last Menstrual Period (LMP) is dynamically calculated by setup_task.sh as 70 days prior to execution. Crucially, the task is defective because "verifier.py" is entirely missing from the environment, making the task unscorable and rendering metadata tolerances like fhr_min (100) or fhr_max (200) unsupported, as the prompt strictly dictates 120-180 bpm.
